description: A vertical graphic built on a real enforcement photograph with a slogan overlay. The photo shows an outdoor scene: in the foreground a detained man (gray hair and beard, dark shirt) stands with his back to the camera, hands cuffed behind his back, while at right a law-enforcement officer seen from behind wears a green tactical/molle vest with a tan/khaki patch reading 'POLICE / ICE' and tan cargo pants with a holstered sidearm; a chain-link fence and green trees form the background. Overlaid on the lower-left is the standard solid-blue box with white serif text 'Making America Safe Again'. The composition uses an authentic arrest image to dramatize enforcement of an alleged human smuggler, lending documentary credibility to the slogan. The propaganda technique pairs a real handcuffing scene with the campaign tagline to project successful inter-agency (USCIS/ICE) enforcement, targeting the general public to demonstrate toughness on immigration crime. Designed agency graphic (photo with branded overlay).
notable_text: POLICE / ICE (officer's vest). Making America Safe Again.
